changeSet.author: nour
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS user_group ( id BIGINT GENERATED BY DEFAULT AS IDENTITY PRIMARY KEY, user_profile_id BIGINT NOT NULL, group_id BIGINT NOT NULL, is_deleted BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT FALSE, deleted_at TIMESTAMPTZ, deleted_by VARCHAR(255), created_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW(), updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW(), created_by VARCHAR(255), updated_by VARCHAR(255) ); COMMENT ON TABLE user_group IS 'Maps users to groups';
